name: motion-tilt
title: Tilt
author: Motion Primitives
description: Applies pointer-position-driven three-dimensional tilt to a child.

changes: Added useReducedMotion handling that omits the generated 3D transform and pointer tracking while preserving caller styles.

modifications.change: Disabled generated transforms and pointer tracking when reduced motion is requested.
modifications.reason: Keep the child static and its hit area stable without replacing the upstream tilt implementation.
